special_mechanics.name: Climber
special_mechanics.description: Lemmings can climb vertically but fall down if they hit an overhang

special_mechanics.name: Floater
special_mechanics.description: Uses a parachute to fall safely from heights

special_mechanics.name: Blocker
special_mechanics.description: Stands still and prevents other lemmings from passing; lemmings reverse direction on collision

special_mechanics.name: Builder
special_mechanics.description: Builds a stairway of 12 steps, stops when hitting head, running out of bricks, or hitting solid object

special_mechanics.name: Basher
special_mechanics.description: Tunnels horizontally, cannot break through steel barriers

special_mechanics.name: Miner
special_mechanics.description: Tunnels diagonally downwards, cannot break through steel barriers

special_mechanics.name: Digger
special_mechanics.description: Tunnels directly downwards, cannot break through steel barriers

special_mechanics.name: Bomber
special_mechanics.description: Explodes after 5-second timer, destroying self and adjacent destructible landscape

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. NES port known for sluggish reactions and inaccurate mechanics compared to Amiga original. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game mechanics are deterministic (skill-based) rather than physics-dependent.
